title: CC: Lectern Hub
description: This mod allows you to have pocket computer lecterns as peripheral hubs!
body:
# CC: Lectern Hub
CC: Lectern Hub allows Pocket Computer lecterns to function as full peripheral hubs!

 ![Pocket Computer screen showing peripherals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a448f8a2fdb0d5cd57638b175619ec4a7ea681f6.png)

## How to setup:
1. Place down a lectern.
2. Break the block beneath it and place a **full-block modem.**
3. Put your **Pocket Computer** on the lectern.
4. It will automatically connect to the modem and act as a peripheral hub!

## ⚠️ NOTE
This mod was built for CC: Tweaked 1.115.0.
Compatibility with 1.116.1 has not yet been fully tested, but it does not crash. Fabric support (via kilt) is not supported, a offical fabric release might happen. 

## SOURCE
The source code isn't uploaded because honestly I'm just lazy, I will upload the code at some point just not now
